purpose: Continue implementing feats from the refreshed descriptions after phases 1-7, prioritizing mechanics that can be safely handled by existing resource, derived, combat option, and roll-context engines.
designPrinciples: Do not add conditional bonuses to static sheet totals.
Use existing engines rather than parallel feat systems.
Convert false scaffold attack modifiers into explicit resource rules or attack options.
Only automate high-confidence mechanics; leave complex prompt/UI flows as partial metadata when the engine cannot fully apply them yet.
Every combat feat implementation must declare its action economy cost or identify the established action/feat it rides.

hitPointAndDamageThresholdRules.notes: Old flat hp.max +5 modifier disabled because Toughness is +1 HP per character level.
Old defense.damageThreshold modifier disabled to avoid double counting.
Old fake attack modifier disabled. Damage Threshold now uses the better of Fortitude or Will when this feat is present.

secondWindRules.consumer: ActorEngine.applySecondWind when options.impetuousMove or options.halfHealingForMovement is true

combatOptions.effect: +1 attack and +1 weapon die damage against adjacent/same-space point-blank targets
+2 melee attack with light/lightsaber weapon context and -5 Reflex rider until next turn
Running Attack rider granting +2 dodge Reflex until next turn

conversationCombatFeatPass.actionEconomy: free immediate extra melee attack rider after qualifying melee drop-to-0 trigger
conversationCombatFeatPass.consumer: CoreCombatReactionFeatActions, updateActor HP watcher, swse.damageApplied, swse.cleaveAvailable

conversationCombatFeatPass.actionEconomy: same free Cleave rider; removes once-per-round limit

conversationCombatFeatPass.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION powerAttack plus two-handed/object-vehicle edge cases
ATTACK_OPTION rapidShot plus Strength-below-13 penalty correction
ATTACK_OPTION meleeDefense BAB slider with Reflex dodge rider
ATTACK_OPTION carefulShot with auto Aim prerequisite if missing
conversationCombatFeatPass.actionEconomy: autoAimIfMissing; Aim consumes two swift actions before the attack when not already aimed

conversationCombatFeatPass.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION deadeye with auto Aim prerequisite if missing
conversationCombatFeatPass.actionEconomy: autoAimIfMissing; Aim consumes two swift actions before the attack when not already aimed
ridesAttackAmmo; ammunition cost handled by AmmoSystem

conversationCombatFeatPass.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION powerfulCharge with auto Charge prerequisite if missing
conversationCombatFeatPass.actionEconomy: autoChargeIfMissing; Charge consumes standard action before attack when not already charging

conversationCombatFeatPass.implementation: ATTACK_OPTION chargingFire with auto Charge prerequisite if missing
conversationCombatFeatPass.actionEconomy: autoChargeIfMissing; Charge consumes standard action before ranged attack when not already charging
spendSwiftActions; consumes two swift actions before attack roll
standardAttackPlusMove riderOnly; marks splitMovementBeforeAfterAttack and does not replace or auto-spend the attack action

deferred.reason: ActorEngine supports the option flag, but the Second Wind UI still needs a player-facing checkbox/action to pass options.impetuousMove.
ActorEngine records delayed healing metadata, but a combat turn/end-of-turn consumer is still needed to apply 5 HP per turn automatically.
CombatOptionResolver now emits defenseModifiers, but runtime application/display of temporary defense riders depends on the caller/UI using that payload.
Running Attack is now correctly represented as a split-movement rider, but token movement before/after the attack depends on the movement workflow/UI honoring splitMovementBeforeAfterAttack.

validation.jsonl: packs/feats.db parsed as valid JSONL with 419 rows
